tasks.title: Bot core: SQLite schema with users/services/slots/appointments/schedule_days tables, including created_at for appointments and schedule_days, service durations, and 30-minute grid alignment (fixes missing creation date tracking, service duration labels, 30-min grid constraint)
Admin schedule panel: weekday selection, working day toggle, open/close time setting, regenerate future slots without deleting existing bookings (fixes conflict prevention mechanism details)

Client booking flow: service selection with durations, current week display (Mon–Sun), slot validity check aligned to 30-min grid, transactional slot availability re-check before booking (fixes 7-day window contradiction, 30-min grid constraint, race condition handling)

Appointment management: /my list with cancellation buttons, /cancel flow with confirmation dialog, prevent cancellation of started appointments, handle foreign ID and not found cases (fixes cancellation restrictions and error behavior)
Daily 10:00 reminder system: send notifications for confirmed appointments, track reminded_at to prevent duplicates, use SHOP_TZ for time rendering (fixes idempotent reminder constraint)
End-to-end integration: ensure all flows use current week logic, validate 30-minute grid alignment, implement error fallbacks for all edge cases, enforce admin access restrictions on /admin_schedule
